links.title: Set time to race
links.tooltip: Set the time range to the selected race's 3-day window

targets.query:
from(bucket: "laps")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "standings" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and (r._field == "position" or r._field == "class_position" or r._field == "lap_count" or r._field == "best_lap_time" or r._field == "last_lap_time"))
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.class)
  |> group(columns: ["car_number", "competitor_name", "car_info", "class", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["car_number", "competitor_name", "car_info", "class"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.class =~ /^(${class:regex})$/)
  |> keep(columns: ["car_number", "competitor_name", "car_info", "class", "position", "class_position", "lap_count", "best_lap_time", "last_lap_time"])
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["position"], desc: false)

list.definition:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: if "${__timezone}" == "utc" then "UTC" else "${__timezone}")
pad = (n) => if n < 10 then "0" + string(v: n) else string(v: n)
from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.race_name + " (" + pad(n: date.month(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.year(t: r._time) % 100) + ");" + r.race_id})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Race
list.name: raceid

query.query:
import "date"
import "timezone"
option location = timezone.location(name: if "${__timezone}" == "utc" then "UTC" else "${__timezone}")
pad = (n) => if n < 10 then "0" + string(v: n) else string(v: n)
from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, _value: r.race_name + " (" + pad(n: date.month(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.monthDay(t: r._time)) + "/" + pad(n: date.year(t: r._time) % 100) + ");" + r.race_id})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.name: race_from
list.definition: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: r._value) * 1000 - 259200000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

query.query: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: r._value) * 1000 - 259200000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.name: race_to
list.definition: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: r._value) * 1000 + 3600000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

query.query: from(bucket: "races") |> range(start: 0) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "race" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "end_time_epoc") |> last() |> map(fn: (r) => ({_value: string(v: int(v: r._value) * 1000 + 3600000)})) |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.definition:
from(bucket: "laps")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lap" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "lap_no")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.class)
  |> group(columns: ["class"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["class"])
  |> rename(columns: {class: "_value"})
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
list.label: Class
list.name: class

query.query:
from(bucket: "laps")
  |> range(start: 0)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "lap" and r.race_id == "${raceid}" and r._field == "lap_no")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.class)
  |> group(columns: ["class"])
  |> last()
  |> keep(columns: ["class"])
  |> rename(columns: {class: "_value"})
  |> group()
  |> sort(columns: ["_value"])
